package rulecoverage

func NegativePackageNameRoleDrift() string {
    ruleID := "package_name_role_drift"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Packages whose names advertise one role, such as `service` or `model`, but whose exported symbols primarily belong to another role."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
